posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 12 of 12 Pending | Tied for 1st with 33 others Shelton vs. ShaykhaevEric Shelton, DECThese picks are way off. Shaykhaev is a massive fraud. He looked good back in ACA but since the layoff he just hasn’t looked the same. I thought the Ruquet fight should’ve gone to r5 but it was a bad look regardless. He was also super unprofessional to all the Cffc staff and missed weight by a ton. He got back in the win column but it was very uninspiring, just laying on a short notice can. Shelton does have a hole in his tdd but he just beat a string grappler last fight and has more experience ce. Getting tapped by Shuya wasn’t a great look but Shaykaev isn’t doing that to Shelton. It would be cool if he wins but I think Shaykaev is a fraudWalking Eagle vs. SheronickHunter Walking Eagle, TKO, R1Where is Cody’s neckPeterson vs. Ennis UkohaChisom Akachi Ennis Ukoha, TKO, R1Gable’s son has been staying active. I remember seeing this other guy before in TNU but no clue if he’s good or not
